items.body: The U.S. military disabled a fifth commercial vessel with a Hellfire missile as it enforced a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz against Iran. items.title: Nvidia Is the World's Largest Company. Is It the Most Important?
items.body: While Nvidia is the world's largest company by market cap with a $500 billion lead over Alphabet, being largest doesn't necessarily mean being most important. Nvidia dominates AI chip manufacturing with GPUs, but competitors like AMD and alternatives like Alphabet/Broadcom's TPU are emerging. Nvidia

items.title: Nvidia Stock At Key Support Ahead of Big Windows PC Launch
items.body:
Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) stock price settled at a crucial support level on Friday as the post-earnings hangover continued. It has moved into a local correction after falling by 10% from its highest point in May. This retreat may usher in a major comeback as Microsoft prepares to launch its first Windows PC next week.
